name: French Cookies/Les Palets De Dames
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak raisins in rum for 2 or 3 hours.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light.
3. Add salt and eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Gradually add flour and soaked raisins, blending thoroughly.
5. Butter a cookie sheet and drop the dough by teaspoon onto the prepared sheet, leaving an inch between cookies for spreading.
6. Bake in a 350 degree F (175 C) oven for 7 minutes.
7. Remove immediately from the pan to a cooling rack.
Makes 35 cookies.
